sources.name: UN Security Council Consolidated List
sources.notes: Official UN consolidated list. Aggregates all active UNSC sanctions regimes.

sources.name: UAE Local Terrorist List
sources.authority: Executive Office for Control and Non-Proliferation (EOCN)
sources.notes: The UAE Local Terrorist List is published by the Cabinet of the UAE and maintained by EOCN. When a machine-readable endpoint is confirmed by the MLRO, add the URL here. Until then, an MLRO-maintained CSV at history/registers/uae-local-list.csv is used as the source of truth.
